# Log Record registry

The following semantic conventions for log records are defined:

* [General](log.md): General semantic attributes that may be used in describing Log Records.
* [Exceptions](exception.md): Semantic attributes that may be used in describing exceptions in logs.
* [Feature Flags](feature-flag.md): Semantic attributes that may be used in describing feature flag evaluations in logs.
